title: Add upper-bound version constraints to volatile dependencies
description: pyproject.toml has four heavy/volatile dependencies with no upper version bounds: sqlite-vec (>=0.1, pre-1.0 beta), onnxruntime (>=1.17, 2.x may break model format), numpy (>=1.26, 2.0 introduced breaking changes), tokenizers (>=0.19). The next uv sync in a fresh environment could silently break the memory subsystem. Add conservative upper-bound constraints: sqlite-vec>=0.1,<1; onnxruntime>=1.17,<3; numpy>=1.26,<3; tokenizers>=0.19,<2. Run uv lock after updating to verify the constraints resolve correctly with the current locked versions.
